name: bytestash
description: Skills for operating a ByteStash snippet manager.

settings.name: API Key
settings.description: Optional ByteStash API key for public/read-only endpoints. Snippet writes still require JWT on current ByteStash.

settings.name: Password
settings.description: ByteStash password used by the hook to mint a JWT for snippet API calls.

settings.name: JWT Token
settings.description: Optional pre-minted ByteStash JWT. Used when username/password are not configured.

settings.name: ByteStash URL
settings.description: Base URL of the ByteStash instance, including scheme. Do not include a trailing slash.

settings.name: Username
settings.description: ByteStash username. Recommended because current ByteStash snippet CRUD requires a JWT session token.
